posts.text:
Powerful.


Tevin Macharia Mukabana (@TevinMacharia)

Josh Howerton, pastor of Lakepointe Church, urged cohabiting couples during a sermon to honor God by getting married.

After the message, 52 couples came forward, met with pastors for counseling, and were married together in a joint ceremony.

The church later celebrated the couples, with more than 1,000 people attending a service to applaud their decision to repent and commit to marriage.





— https://nitter.net/TevinMacharia/status/203281
Tremendous MAC Championship. Congrats to John Groce and the Akron Zips. Akron and Miami in the Big Dance. What a story for John Groce and his younger brother Travis Steele!

Ma'am, that's certainly the impression the anonymous account created over the past couple of months. 

P.S. I like the way you flirt.


ShadyLadyKady (@shadyladykady)

Simple? You said “ no one knows the motive of this poster…” when the poster you’re referring to, has been slandering Erika Kirk for MONTHS. It’s obvious what the motive is, you fat cow.



— https://nitter.net/shadyladykady/status/2032910363289960507#m

Ma'am, you're simple and that's OK. The world needs simple people. They make the best sandwiches.


ShadyLadyKady (@shadyladykady)

The motive is to slander and to mark Erika as a trafficker, you moron.



— https://nitter.net/shadyladykady/status/2032907218883138005#m

Probably need to outlaw social media anonymity. That's been my gut feeling for years. But I haven't thought through all the consequences of that.


PeeNutGallery (@PeeNutGallery42)

Might just be me, but I feel like with this new day and age of constant misinformation - it kind of sullys or lessens the impact of 1A. Whereas before you had people really protecting and standing up for it, now that there isn't any misinformation police, these voices that were once prominent are now drowned out. I d

I didn't see where I said he did.


Ralph Furley (@RalphFurley69)

I didn’t see where he advocated for any legislation.



— https://nitter.net/RalphFurley69/status/2032903511520813121#m
I'm anti-misinformation and the amplification of it. However, we can survive misinformation and its amplification. COVID proved that. What we cannot survive is infringement on free speech.

I think we should ALL be careful here. No one knows the motive(s) of the poster sharing the bad information. 

I'm an old newspaper person. I loved the "good old days" when news moved slower. That's why I'm not the best at social media. I don't mind waiting. 

Slippery slope to justify the outlawing of free speech. 

Laws are rewritten off emotion and emotional events. Politicians need victims to rewrite the Constitution. Life at the top of political power is messy and dangerous. There are virtu

Boom


Immortal Tessy (@TheresaArueyin1)

As a parent your priority should be getting your child into Heaven, not Harvard.



— https://nitter.net/TheresaArueyin1/status/2032547668971421962#m

Epstein files and war with Iran, biggest fumbles since…???


Polymarket (@Polymarket)

JUST IN: Democrats now officially projected to seize control of the senate.







— https://nitter.net/Polymarket/status/2032823921427276275#m

"(The NET formula) rigged the whole system to protect the big conferences. I was in the meetings, I know what happened." - Former South Carolina/Kansas State and current UMass head coach, Frank Martin.

Video

Facts.


Dave Briggs (@DBriggsBlade)

Toledo coach Tod Kowalczyk on Miami: "Nobody in the history of college basketball deserves to get in the tournament more than them. Anybody that would argue that — I hate to say this about anybody — but I really would question their intelligence."



— https://nitter.net/DBriggsBlade/status/2032199835818901750#m

Facts.


Sam Block (@theblockspot)

Miami of Ohio is 31-1.
Miami of Ohio is 31-1.
Miami of Ohio is 31-1.
Miami of Ohio is 31-1.
Miami of Ohio is 31-1.
Miami of Ohio is 31-1.
Miami of Ohio is 31-1.
Miami of Ohio is 31-1.
Miami of Ohio is 31-1.

68 TEAMS GET IN.
Simply RIDICULOUS to leave them out.



— https://nitter.net/theblockspot/status/2032141230495179223#m

I take a little sip of Caitlin Clark and I think I’m drunk again. Loved watching her play yesterday.

Video

The idea that all these different sports are doing record TV numbers across the board is such a joke to me. The only thing this rigged system couldn’t set records for was the Super Bowl and Bad Bunny halftime show—very telling.

Video

Fact.


Pat Forde (@ByPatForde)

Column: It's pretty simple. Miami is making the NCAA Tournament or else college basketball is broken. bit.ly/4b9rRIU




— https://nitter.net/ByPatForde/status/2032187502308516025#m

Facts


#20 Barstool RedHawks (@BarstoolMiamiU)

if you are rooting for a 31-1 team to be left out, there is a special place in hell for you



— https://nitter.net/BarstoolMiamiU/status/2032147163699167680#m
